title: setiscapella pusilla
intro: Setiscapella pusilla, also known as the little helmet flower, is a type of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to inhibit inflammation and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of Setiscapella pusilla include its potential to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation, making it a promising treatment for various skin conditions. Setiscapella pusilla can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
